citations.locator: Monthly Household Expenditure > Housing > Rent, Mortgage or Accommodation Costs

citations.quote: upload a bank statement for each account showing the last 30 days transactions
I commute from Glasgow to Edinburgh in order to attend my classes and placement requirements

findings.text: The applicant self-reported monthly rent/accommodation costs of £5,526.66 in the hardship funding application.
The applicant states they commute daily from Glasgow to Edinburgh for classes and placement.
No bank statements were provided in this work order. The task 'Cross-check rent figure against bank statements' cannot be performed with the available evidence.
The self-reported rent of £5,526.66/month is anomalously high for a student commuting from Glasgow, suggesting a possible data entry error or inclusion of non-housing costs.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Rent Cross-Check Result

**Task:** verify-rent-against-bank-stmts

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2)

**Finding:** The only source provided is a hardship funding application form. It contains a self-reported monthly rent/accommodation cost of **£5,526.66**. No bank statements were included in this work order.

**Conclusion:** The rent figure cannot be verified against bank statements because the required bank statements are absent. The reported figure is anomalously high for a student commuting from Glasgow, which may indicate a data entry error or inclusion of non-housing costs.

**Recommendation:** A follow-up task has been proposed to locate and upload the applicant's bank statements for the relevant period.
proposed_artifacts.title: Rent cross-check result – bank statements missing

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's source inventory and file system for bank statements associated with applicant Anfal Elbushra (Monzo account or other accounts). The hardship application (NAP-SRC-0008) requires statements showing the last 30 days of transactions. If found, upload them as new sources and re-run the verify-rent-against-bank-stmts task. If not found, request the applicant or caseworker to provide the statements.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate and upload bank statements for applicant Anfal Elbushra

risk_flags.text: Self-reported rent figure appears implausibly high and may be erroneous.

summary: The sole source (NAP-SRC-0008) is a hardship funding application form, not a bank statement. It contains a self-reported monthly rent/accommodation cost of £5,526.66, which is anomalously high for a student. No bank statements are present in this work order to cross-check. The task cannot be completed with the provided evidence. A follow-up task is proposed to locate and upload the required bank statements.

uncertainties.text: No bank statements are available in the provided source materials to verify the rent figure.
The reported rent figure is unusually high; it may be a typo or include other costs.
